top_findings.title: Delivered JavaScript, not the specified TypeScript
top_findings.evidence: stack.json sets language=typescript, but the workspace contains only .js files (server.js, test.js, demo.js) with no .ts sources, no tsconfig.json, and no type annotations; scores.json records idiomatic=0.0 and maintainability=0.20 as a result.
top_findings.suggestion: Implement in TypeScript (typed Express handlers, tsconfig.json, ts-jest) to satisfy the language factor for this cell.
